heading: Reports on investments in the energy sector of Iran
label: 8518 Reports on investments in the energy sector of Iran
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section, see .section 8551(a) of this title

Amendments2012—Subsec. (b). substituted “a report, covering the 180-day period beginning on the date that is 30 days before the date on which the preceding report was required to be submitted by this section, that—” for “a report containing the matters required in the report under subsection (a)(1) for the 180-day period beginning on the date that is 30 days before the date on which the preceding report was required to be submitted by this section.” and added pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 112–158

Delegation of FunctionsFunctions of President under this section delegated to Secretary of State, see Memorandum of President of the United States, , 75 F.R. 67025, set out as a note under .Sept. 23, 2010section 8501 of this title
amendments: Amendments2012—Subsec. (b). substituted “a report, covering the 180-day period beginning on the date that is 30 days before the date on which the preceding report was required to be submitted by this section, that—” for “a report containing the matters required in the report under subsection (a)(1) for the 180-day period beginning on the date that is 30 days before the date on which the preceding report was required to be submitted by this section.” and added pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 112–158

children.label: A
children.text: on investments in the energy sector of Iran that were made during the period described in paragraph (2); and

children.label: i
children.text: an estimate of the volume of energy-related resources (other than refined petroleum), including ethanol, that Iran imported during the period described in paragraph (2); and

children.label: ii
children.text: a list of all significant known energy-related joint ventures, investments, and partnerships located outside Iran that involve Iranian entities in partnership with entities from other countries, including an identification of the entities from other countries; and

children.label: I
children.text: the total value of each such joint venture, investment, and partnership; and

children.label: II
children.text: the percentage of each such joint venture, investment, and partnership owned by an Iranian entity.

children.heading: Period described
children.label: 2 Period described
children.text: The period described in this paragraph is the period beginning on , and ending on the date that is 60 days after .January 1, 2006July 1, 2010
contains the matters required in the report under subsection (a)(1); and

children.label: A
children.text: the volume of crude oil and refined petroleum products imported to and exported from Iran (including through swaps and similar arrangements);

children.label: B
children.text: the persons selling and transporting crude oil and refined petroleum products described in subparagraph (A), the countries with primary jurisdiction over those persons, and the countries in which those products were refined;

children.label: C
children.text: the sources of financing for imports to Iran of crude oil and refined petroleum products described in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: i
children.text: developing upstream oil and gas production capacity;

children.label: ii
children.text: importing advanced technology to upgrade existing Iranian refineries;

children.label: iii
children.text: converting existing chemical plants to petroleum refineries; or

children.label: iv
children.text: maintaining, upgrading, or expanding existing refineries or constructing new refineries.
